## Why

## Verification

<!-- List the exact commands and manual checks you ran. Do not claim checks you did not run. -->

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run scan -- . --output maniflight-report` when scan or report behavior changed
- [ ] Generated report inspected when visual behavior changed

## Rule or scoring impact

<!-- List affected rule IDs, status/severity changes, schema changes, or write "None". -->

## Screenshots

<!-- Include before/after images only for visible report changes. Remove this section otherwise. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change has one coherent scope.
- [ ] Tests or fixtures cover new behavior.
- [ ] Documentation matches commands, configuration, rules, and output.
- [ ] Backward compatibility and known limitations are explained.
- [ ] No secrets, private repository data, or generated report artifacts are committed.
- [ ] Material AI assistance is disclosed when it helps reviewers assess provenance or risk.
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and will follow the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
